items.title: EntityDeclaration
items.description: A named entity type the application tracks.

domain.title: DomainContext
domain.description: What the application does, what entities it tracks, what decisions it makes.

behavioural.title: BehaviouralContext
behavioural.description: How data arrives and any operational constraints.

items.title: SemanticHint
items.description: Domain-specific vocabulary entry injected into LLM prompts.

anyOf.title: CalibrationBias
anyOf.description:
Cost asymmetry between false negatives and false positives.

bias_direction is always auto-derived — never set by the caller:
  false_negative_cost > false_positive_cost  → recall
    (missing a real event is more costly; prefer sensitivity)
  false_positive_cost > false_negative_cost  → precision
    (spurious alerts are more costly; prefer specificity)
  equal costs                                → balanced

schema.title: CreateContextRequest
schema.description:
Request body for POST /context.

bias_direction inside calibration_bias (if supplied) is ignored —
it is always auto-derived by CalibrationBias.model_validator.
